title: Modded Survival +
description: An mostly Survival based Modpack with a few Optimization, Fun and Quality of life Mods
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c789c5365283c032529705141419070e5a0a684.png)

Modded Survival Plus is an Mostly Vanilla based Modpack with a few Additions aimed to make Minecraft a bit easier, Optimized and Beautifuler. A few Mods include YUNG's Better Mineshafts, Dungeons , Nether Fortresses, Ocean Monuments and Sodium and Indium for better Performance on lower End PC's (like mine) Xaero's World/Mini Map for Waypoints, or Waystones for quicker and easier Traveling. And a lot more.

# 📜 Features
- Sodium with Sodium Extra and Reese's Sodium Option's
- Waystones, Bartering Stations, Xaero's Mini and World Map, AppleSkin, Advanced Netherite, Chipped, EMI, Shulker Tooltip and [lots of other Mods](https://moddermore.net/list/YDRtT9rstJUC)
- Mods From Creators like [YUNGNICKYOUNG](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG),  [sketchmacaw](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw), [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3), [Prospector](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector) and many more
- Macaw's Windows, Trapdoors, Doors, Furniture and other.
- Over 200+ Mods
# 🗺️ Roadmap
- Quests to Help you progress Faster
- Monthly Updates
- Adding more Mods
